basic_details.job_title: AAI NER Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 95 Graduate, Diploma, ITI Apprentice Posts
basic_details.post_name: Graduate Apprentice, Diploma Apprentice & ITI Trade Apprentice
basic_details.short_information: Airports Authority of India (AAI), Regional Headquarters (North Eastern Region), Guwahati has released a recruitment notification for Apprenticeship Training 2026-27. The organisation invites online applications from eligible candidates for Graduate Apprentice, Diploma Apprentice and ITI Trade Apprentice posts under the Apprentices Act, 1961.

important_dates.raw: Last Date for Submission of Application: 28-07-2026

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 Years Maximum Age: 26 Years Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree / Diploma / ITI in Relevant Discipline

selection_process: Merit List based on percentage of marks in qualifying examination. Interview / Document Verification. Medical Fitness Certificate Verification.
how_to_apply: Visit the NATS portal for Graduate/Diploma Apprentice registration.
Visit the Apprenticeship India portal for ITI Apprentice registration.
Search for Airports Authority of India - RHQ NER, Guwahati establishment.
Submit the application before the last date.
Keep a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.airports_authority_of_india_aai: Graduate Apprentice, Diploma Apprentice & ITI Trade Apprentice
Degree / Diploma / ITI in Relevant Discipline

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Last Date for Submission of Application: 28-07-2026

content_sections.heading: AAI NER Apprentice Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: Airports Authority of India has announced vacancies for Graduate, Diploma and ITI Apprentice positions. The post-wise vacancy details are given below:

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for AAI NER Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates having the required educational qualification can apply for AAI Apprentice Recruitment 2026. The eligibility details are as follows: Graduate Apprentice: Candidates should possess a full-time regular four-year degree in Engineering in the relevant discipline recognised by AICTE, Government of India. Diploma Apprentice: Candidates should possess a full-time regular three-year Diploma in Engineering in the relevant discipline recognised by AICTE, Government of India. ITI Apprentice: Candidates should possess ITI/NCVT certificate in relevant trade from recognised institutions. Eligibility Condition: Candidates who passed Graduate/Diploma in 2024 or after 2024 are eligible.

content_sections.heading: AAI NER Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 Years Maximum Age: 26 Years Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government of India rules.

content_sections.heading: AAI NER Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
AAI NER Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Merit List based on percentage of marks in qualifying examination. Interview / Document Verification. Medical Fitness Certificate Verification.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for AAI NER Apprentice Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the NATS portal for Graduate/Diploma Apprentice registration. Visit the Apprenticeship India portal for ITI Apprentice registration. Search for Airports Authority of India - RHQ NER, Guwahati establishment. Select the appropriate apprenticeship discipline. Complete the online application process. Upload required documents and certificates. Submit the application before the last date. Keep a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AAI NER Apprentice Important Links
content_sections.text: Apply Online: Click here Official Notification PDF : Click here Official Website: Click here Join Arattai Channel: Click Here Join Telegram Channel: Click Here Join WhatsApp Channel : Click Here Sarkari Result : Click Here Download Mobile App: Click Here

faq.question: Q1. What is the full form of AAI?
faq.answer: AAI stands for Airports Authority of India.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in AAI NER Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The available posts are Graduate Apprentice, Diploma Apprentice and ITI Trade Apprentice.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in AAI NER Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: AAI has announced a total of 95 Apprentice vacancies under the North Eastern Region.

faq.question: Q4. What is the training period for AAI NER Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The apprenticeship training period is one year.

faq.question: Q5. What is the qualification required for AAI Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates should have a full-time regular Degree, Diploma or ITI qualification in the relevant discipline from recognised institutions.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for AAI NER Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 26 years as on 28 July 2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q7. What is the last date to apply for AAI NER Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 28 July 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for AAI NER Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is required for this apprenticeship recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for AAI NER Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates will be shortlisted based on marks percentage in the qualifying examination. Shortlisted candidates will be called for Interview/Document Verification and Medical Fitness Certificate verification.

faq.question: Q10. How can candidates apply for AAI NER Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the NATS portal for Graduate/Diploma Apprentices and the Apprenticeship India portal for ITI Trade Apprentices.
